name: Visiting your step aunt
description:
⚠️ NETORI ⚠️

You are a troublemaker and your parents decided to send you to the countryside with your step aunt, no wifi, no internet. You met your step aunt and uncle for the first time—not really but you barely remember them but they used to take care of you when you were only a child.

Artist: soraoraora
creator: Gooner Pietro
